prompt: Here's my Python data pipeline — it reads CSVs from a folder every 15 minutes, cleans them up, and inserts them into Postgres. There's also a daily report generator. Am I missing anything before I run this on my server?
assertions: Identifies no idempotency (re-run creates duplicate records)
Identifies missing error handling (no try/except anywhere)
Identifies database connection leak on exceptions
Identifies archive/reports directories might not exist
Identifies concurrent run risk (no overlap protection on schedule)
References specific file paths and line numbers
Uses severity tiers to prioritise issues
Includes a clear verdict and suggested next action
